import java.io.FileInputStream
import scala.io.Source
import scala.util.Using
import scala.jdk.CollectionConverters._

import org.semanticweb.owlapi.formats.FunctionalSyntaxDocumentFormat

import org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Model
import org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ModelFactory
import org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ResourceFactory
import org.apache.jena.vocabulary.RDFS
import org.apache.jena.sys.JenaSystem
import scribe.Logger

JenaSystem.init()
Logger("org.obolibrary.oboformat.parser.OBOFormatParser").clearHandlers().clearModifiers().orphan().replace()
Logger("org.obolibrary.obo2owl.OWLAPIOwl2Obo").clearHandlers().clearModifiers().orphan().replace()

val RheaNS = "http://rdf.rhea-db.org/"
val DbXref = AnnotationProperty("http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref")
val Definition = AnnotationProperty("http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115")
val Reaction = ResourceFactory.createResource(s"${RheaNS}Reaction")
val DirectionalReaction = ResourceFactory.createResource(s"${RheaNS}DirectionalReaction")
val BidirectionalReaction = ResourceFactory.createResource(s"${RheaNS}BidirectionalReaction")
val Status = ResourceFactory.createProperty(s"${RheaNS}status")
val Obsolete = ResourceFactory.createResource(s"${RheaNS}Obsolete")

/**
  * Find any xrefs or definition xrefs in the ontology referencing an unknown Rhea term,
  * remove these axioms, and save.
  */
val ontologyFile = os.Path(args(0), os.pwd)
val catalogFile = os.Path(args(1), os.pwd)
val rheaFile = os.Path(args(2), os.pwd)
val outFile = os.Path(args(3), os.pwd)

val model = ModelFactory.createDefaultModel()
  Using.resource(new FileInputStream(rheaFile.toIO))(model.read(_, ""))
  val undirectedReactions = model.listResourcesWithProperty(RDFS.subClassOf, Reaction).asScala.to(Set)
  val directionalReactions = model.listResourcesWithProperty(RDFS.subClassOf, DirectionalReaction).asScala.to(Set)
  val bidirectionalReactions = model.listResourcesWithProperty(RDFS.subClassOf, BidirectionalReaction).asScala.to(Set)
  val allReactions = (undirectedReactions ++ directionalReactions ++ bidirectionalReactions)
    .flatMap(n => Option(n.getURI()))
    .map(_.replace(RheaNS, ""))
  val obsoleteReactions = model
    .listResourcesWithProperty(Status, Obsolete)
    .asScala
    .to(Set)
    .flatMap(n => Option(n.getURI()))
    .map(_.replace(RheaNS, ""))
  val manager = OWLManager.createOWLOntologyManager()
  manager.getIRIMappers.add(new CatalogXmlIRIMapper(catalogFile.toIO))
  val ontology = manager.loadOntology(IRI.create(ontologyFile.toIO))
  val axioms = ontology.getAxioms().asScala.to(Set)
  var obsoleteUsages = Set.empty[String]
  val xrefsToRemove = for {
    ann @ AnnotationAssertion(_, DbXref, _, s"RHEA:${rhea}" ^^ _) <- axioms
    _ = if (obsoleteReactions(rhea)) obsoleteUsages += rhea
    if !allReactions(rhea)
  } yield {
    scribe.warn(s"No such Rhea identifier, filtering xref: RHEA:$rhea")
    new RemoveAxiom(ontology, ann)
  }
  val defXrefsChanges = for {
    ann @ AnnotationAssertion(subAnnotations, Definition, _, _) <- axioms
    _ = obsoleteUsages ++= subAnnotations
        .collect { case subAnn @ Annotation(_, DbXref, s"RHEA:${rhea}" ^^ _) => rhea }
        .filter(obsoleteReactions)
    allDefXrefs = subAnnotations.collect {
      case subAnn @ Annotation(_, DbXref, _) => subAnn

import org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Model
import org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ModelFactory
import org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ResourceFactory
import org.apache.jena.vocabulary.RDFS
import org.apache.jena.sys.JenaSystem
import scribe.Logger

JenaSystem.init()
Logger("org.obolibrary.oboformat.parser.OBOFormatParser").clearHandlers().clearModifiers().orphan().replace()
Logger("org.obolibrary.obo2owl.OWLAPIOwl2Obo").clearHandlers().clearModifiers().orphan().replace()

val RheaNS = "http://rdf.rhea-db.org/"
val DbXref = AnnotationProperty("http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref")
val Definition = AnnotationProperty("http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115")
val Reaction = ResourceFactory.createResource(s"${RheaNS}Reaction")
val DirectionalReaction = ResourceFactory.createResource(s"${RheaNS}DirectionalReaction")
val BidirectionalReaction = ResourceFactory.createResource(s"${RheaNS}BidirectionalReaction")
val Status = ResourceFactory.createProperty(s"${RheaNS}status")
val Obsolete = ResourceFactory.createResource(s"${RheaNS}Obsolete")

/**
  * Find any xrefs or definition xrefs in the ontology referencing an unknown Rhea term,
  * remove these axioms, and save.
  */
val ontologyFile = os.Path(args(0), os.pwd)
val catalogFile = os.Path(args(1), os.pwd)
val rheaFile = os.Path(args(2), os.pwd)
val outFile = os.Path(args(3), os.pwd)

val model = ModelFactory.createDefaultModel()
  Using.resource(new FileInputStream(rheaFile.toIO))(model.read(_, ""))
  val undirectedReactions = model.listResourcesWithProperty(RDFS.subClassOf, Reaction).asScala.to(Set)
  val directionalReactions = model.listResourcesWithProperty(RDFS.subClassOf, DirectionalReaction).asScala.to(Set)
  val bidirectionalReactions = model.listResourcesWithProperty(RDFS.subClassOf, BidirectionalReaction).asScala.to(Set)
  val allReactions = (undirectedReactions ++ directionalReactions ++ bidirectionalReactions)
    .flatMap(n => Option(n.getURI()))
    .map(_.replace(RheaNS, ""))
  val obsoleteReactions = model
    .listResourcesWithProperty(Status, Obsolete)
    .asScala
    .to(Set)
    .flatMap(n => Option(n.getURI()))
    .map(_.replace(RheaNS, ""))
  val manager = OWLManager.createOWLOntologyManager()
  manager.getIRIMappers.add(new CatalogXmlIRIMapper(catalogFile.toIO))
  val ontology = manager.loadOntology(IRI.create(ontologyFile.toIO))
  val axioms = ontology.getAxioms().asScala.to(Set)
  var obsoleteUsages = Set.empty[String]
  val xrefsToRemove = for {
    ann @ AnnotationAssertion(_, DbXref, _, s"RHEA:${rhea}" ^^ _) <- axioms
    _ = if (obsoleteReactions(rhea)) obsoleteUsages += rhea
    if !allReactions(rhea)
  } yield {
    scribe.warn(s"No such Rhea identifier, filtering xref: RHEA:$rhea")
    new RemoveAxiom(ontology, ann)
  }
  val defXrefsChanges = for {
    ann @ AnnotationAssertion(subAnnotations, Definition, _, _) <- axioms
    _ = obsoleteUsages ++= subAnnotations
        .collect { case subAnn @ Annotation(_, DbXref, s"RHEA:${rhea}" ^^ _) => rhea }
        .filter(obsoleteReactions)
    allDefXrefs = subAnnotations.collect {
      case subAnn @ Annotation(_, DbXref, _) => subAnn

input.command:
cat > /tmp/issue_comment.md << 'EOF' ## Investigation ### What changed in Rhea RHEA:10836 has been obsoleted upstream. Confirmed via the live Rhea SPARQL endpoint: > "The reaction has been replaced by RHEA:86143 and RHEA:86147" This is a **split**, not a rename. What was modeled as a single NADPH-dependent monooxygenase is now modeled as two separate enzymatic steps (a bienzyme mechanism described in [Qi et al. 2021, JACS, PMID:34586791](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34586791/) — "Bienzyme-Catalytic and Dioxygenation-Mediated Anthraquinone Ring Opening"): | Old (obsolete) | New replacements | |---|---| | RHEA:10836 `questin + NADPH + O2 = demethylsulochrin + NADP(+)` (EC 1.14.13.43) | **RHEA:86147** `questin hydroquinone + NADP(+) = questin + NADPH + 2 H(+)` (EC **1.1.1.443**) — reductase step
**RHEA:86143** `questin hydroquinone + O2 = demethylsulochrin + 2 H(+)` (EC **1.13.11.96**) — dioxygenase / ring-opening step | The corresponding EC entry confirms the split: ``` ID 1.14.13.43 DE Transferred entry: 1.1.1.443 and 1.13.11.96. ``` ### Impact on go-edit.obo Only one term references RHEA:10836: - **GO:0050246** `questin monooxygenase (NADPH) activity` — has both a def-xref `[RHEA:10836]` and `xref: RHEA:10836 {source="skos:exactMatch"}`, plus `xref: EC:1.14.13.43 {source="skos:exactMatch"}` (also obsolete/transferred). MetaCyc and KEGG_REACTION xrefs remain. This is the only obsolete Rhea ID currently used anywhere in go-edit.obo (checked all xref and def-xref occurrences against the full Rhea obsolete list — 1184 obsolete reactions; only RHEA:10836 intersects with GO usage). No annotations need to be touched here (GO:0050246 itself is not obsoleted, just its mapping). The build failure in #32203 comes from `src/util/filter-rhea-xrefs.sc`, which exits 1 when any xref points to a Rhea-obsolete reaction. ### Options **A. Minimal — strip obsolete xrefs, keep term as-is.** Remove `xref: RHEA:10836` and `xref: EC:1.14.13.43` (and the corresponding def-xref provenance, replaced with e.g. `GOC:dragon-ai-agent`). Term stays with its current label/def. Unblocks #32203 immediately. Downside: leaves a term whose chemistry is no longer how Rhea/EC view this activity, with no new mappings. **B. Editorial — obsolete GO:0050246, mint two replacement terms.** *(recommended)* - Obsolete GO:0050246 with `consider:` (or `replaced_by:` if appropriate) pointing to the two new terms. - Create a new MF term for the reductase step → maps to RHEA:86147 / EC 1.1.1.443. - Create a new MF term for the questin-hydroquinone dioxygenase / anthraquinone-ring-opening step → maps to RHEA:86143 / EC 1.13.11.96. - Cite PMID:34586791. B faithfully captures the bienzyme mechanism Rhea/EC are now using and is consistent with how #31423 was handled for a simpler rename. The catch: this is a fungal secondary-metabolism activity (questin → demethylsulochrin in the emodin/sulochrin biosynthesis pathway), unlikely to have many existing annotations, but worth a curator's call on whether the obsoletion is warranted vs. a "redefine and remap" approach. ### Proposed next step Happy to proceed with either option. My recommendation is **B**, but it's a chemistry/curator call (cc @pgaudet @sjm41 who handled the analogous #31423). If consensus is "just unblock the build for now", I can ship A and leave a follow-up issue for the proper split. --- 🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent** - Model: `claude-opus-4-7` - Agent harness: claude-code - Triggered by: @balhoff - Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/27623490394) EOF gh issue comment 32207 --body-file /tmp/issue_comment.md 2>&1

content.text:
Posted the analysis and proposal to issue #32207.

**Summary of findings:**

- RHEA:10836 was obsoleted upstream and **split** into two new reactions: RHEA:86143 (dioxygenase, EC 1.13.11.96) and RHEA:86147 (reductase, EC 1.1.1.443). Old EC 1.14.13.43 was correspondingly transferred to both new ECs (Qi et al. 2021, PMID:34586791 — bienzyme mechanism).
- Only **GO:0050246** `questin monooxygenase (NADPH) activity` is affected — it carries both an obsolete RHEA xref and an obsolete EC xref. This is the only obsolete-Rhea collision across all of go-edit.obo (verified by intersecting the full 1184-entry Rhea obsolete list with all GO xrefs/def-xrefs).
- The build failure on PR #32203 comes from `src/util/filter-rhea-xrefs.sc`, which hard-fails on any GO xref pointing to a Rhea-obsolete reaction.

**Proposed options on the issue:**
- **A (minimal):** strip obsolete xrefs, keep term — unblocks #32203 immediately.
- **B (recommended):** obsolete GO:0050246 and mint two new MF terms for the two new reactions, mirroring how #31423 was handled. Asked @pgaudet / @sjm41 for the curator call. No edits made — awaiting decision.
